recommendedPaper.title: Pretraining Recurrent Networks without Recurrence
recommendedPaper.summary: Training recurrent neural networks (RNNs) requires assigning credit across long sequences of computations. Standard backpropagation through time (BPTT) addresses this problem poorly: it is sequential in time, limiting parallelism, and suffers from vanishing or exploding gradients, making long-range
